reviews.title: will not visit again
reviews.positives: The location and cleanliness of the room
reviews.negatives:
I hope this message finds you well. I recently stayed at Waldorf Astoria Bangkok from 24th October 2024 to 29th October 2024, and I wanted to take a moment to share my experience regarding a few issues I encountered during my stay.

Firstly, I was not satisfied with the view from my room. I had expected and pre-requested a more pleasant view, but nothing was considered. We have changed the room on the same day to a city view, but surprisingly it was a parking view!!
Secondly and the main pain point was with the air conditioning in my room. It was not functioning properly; I have requested for a technician visit who had come and tried to fix the issue, but it didn’t work. After many calls they offered me (at 5am) a fan to be able to sleep or change the room!!! I was surprised how this property can be a 5 stars hotel!!Despite my efforts to contact the front desk & room service, the room remained uncomfortably warm, which affected my overall comfort during my stay.
I did reach out to the manager on the first day to discuss these concerns, but I didn’t get a proper response from him, he messaged me promising for a better service for my next visit (as if I will waste my money in next visit) 

can’t tell you more about the facilities available at the property, no business center!! No proper TV channels (TV was not supporting Netflix, YouTube. Etc).
 
I hope you will take my feedback into consideration to improve the experience for all guests at your hotel. Thank you for your attention to this matter, and I look forward to your response.



Best regards,

reviews.title: Silence and luxury
reviews.text: The interior of the Waldorf Astoria Bangkok is a beautiful space where elegance and modern luxury blend together. Designed by the master André Fu, it shines with Art Deco curves and high-quality materials throughout. The guest rooms have a marble and bronze base, creating a tranquil and sophisticated atmosphere. The lobby and bar have high ceilings, with impressive play of light and shadow. This hotel is ideal for travelers with a high aesthetic sense who wish to experience calmness and luxury.
reviews.response:
Reply:
Dear Yoshinaka, 

Thank you for staying with us recently and for taking the time to share your feedback.
We are pleased to hear that your overall experience met your expectations and that you had a pleasant stay with us.
We are also truly honored by your appreciation of the hotel’s design and ambiance - where André Fu’s vision of Art Deco elegance and contemporary luxury comes to life.
It is wonderful to know that the refined details, from the materials to the serene atmosphere, resonated with your experience.
We look forward to welcoming you back for another unforgettable stay.

reviews.title: Great hotel however
reviews.text:
The facility is very nice. The breakfast is definitely worth adding to your stay. Our entire family really enjoyed it. Staff was professional and pleasant. The location is in the middle of the city with plenty of shopping. Most things for children are quite far. So I wish there was a room in this facility for children. The pool has quite a nice view of a golf course and is serene, with a bit of city views.

However, we had someone steal $1000 from our wallet in our room. The wallet was hidden inside our luggage. We only noticed when we were packing up to check out. The hotel said they would investigate it, but I don’t think much could be done since there are no cameras inside the suites. 

Given that this is one of the best rated hotels in Bangkok, I was very disappointed that such an incident would happen. I felt a little too safe, which was a mistake on our end. 

I would have loved to give a 5 star rating, but the ending of the trip left us with some disappointment.
reviews.response:
Dear Jessica, 
Thank you for your generous score rating and for taking the time to review your stay here. It brings us great joy to know that you and your family had a wonderful experience during your stay. We appreciate your positive feedback regarding the excellent service provided by our team members, breakfast experience at The Brasserie and the swimming pool with a view.  Therefore, we apologize for the incident that caused you a frustration during your stay. We take the security of our guests seriously and initiated an investigation into the matter. While there are no cameras inside the suites, we assure you that we have reviewed our security protocols to prevent similar incidents in the future. Your feedback is valuable to us, and we appreciate your understanding.

Hope you plan to revisit soon.
Best regards,
Waldorf Astoria Bangkok team

reviews.title: A Memorable Celebration at the Waldorf Astoria
reviews.text:
I went here for a family trip with my mom and sister to celebrate her retirement. Every staff member was incredibly warm, welcoming, and assisted us with restaurant recommendations, tour suggestions, and helped us make reservations for tours, massages, and the bar. There was a staff member named Pookie (I apologize if I misspelled the name) who left a card for my mom, which deeply touched her. I want to express my gratitude to her once again.

Even though it was my mother's first trip abroad, she felt very comfortable and thoroughly enjoyed her trip, creating many beautiful memories in Thailand to carry home. We stayed at several hotels during our trip in Bangkok, but I can confidently say that the Waldorf Astoria was one of the best. I highly recommend it.
reviews.response:
Dear JISU,
It was a genuine pleasure to have you, your mother, and your sister stayed with us recently. We were truly thrilled to be a part of this joyful family celebration in honor of your mother's retirement.
We are delighted to learn that she had a wonderful time, and we are especially pleased to hear that our team member, Pookie (correct spelling), went the extra mile to enhance her experience.
Providing our guests with an exceptional and memorable stay is our utmost priority, and it brings us immense satisfaction to know that we achieved just that for you. 
Your kind words and recommendations are greatly appreciated, and we hope to have the pleasure of welcoming all of you back in the future.

Kind regards,
Simeon Olle
General Manager

reviews.title: Good service, good quality of buffet
reviews.text:
I know many of you would prefer to eat Thai street food but we prefer to start our morning chill and enjoy breakfast in the comfort of our hotel. Before we start, the service staff showed us the available buffet line and how to order our coffee/tea (the Thai milk tea is a MUST TRY!!) before we are seated at our table. We were impressed with the extensive choices of breakfast offered - western (big breakfast, salad bar, cereal), Chinese (congee, dim sum, dumpling soup) and Thai (flat noodles, Tom yum fried rice). Dessert includes fruits, pastries, soft-serve ice cream, waffles, pancakes, and French toast). If you are an egg lover like me, you get varieties options to choose from (I ordered a poached egg with a muffin). The egg is cooked in the kitchen and served to us while we are enjoying the buffet line. The best part is breakfast is served until 11 am on a weekday and 11.30 am on a weekend so if you are not an early bird, worry not! My sister and I are already planning our next trip to Waldorf Astoria because we are both in love with the breakfast! 

In the room:
- Icy lemongrass welcome drink upon check-in
- 500ml mineral water x 6 provided daily (yup, that’s three bottles for each of us)
- Daily fruit bowl (first-day apple and second-day orange)
- Fresh coconut juice ready in the fridge upon check-in
- Impressive mini bar with liquor, chips and a coffee machine
- Aesop brand shampoo, hair conditioner and body wash

General:
- Stylish and modern hotel design
- Superb service by the frontline service staff. They are polite, efficient and able to converse well in English.
reviews.response:
Dear Cindy,
Thank you very much for choosing to stay with us, and for taking the time to share your experience.
The breakfast at The Brasserie is favoured by many guests and we are delighted to hear that you had a great breakfast experience and enjoyed the variety of our offerings.
We are pleased to learn that you had a wonderful stay and that you enjoyed the facilities and the hospitality given by our team members. The comfortable and enjoyable stay of our guests is our main priority and your feedback is very rewarding to our team.  
We look forward to the pleasure of welcoming you back to Waldorf Astoria Bangkok whenever your plans allow.
 
Kind regards,
Waldorf Astoria Bangkok Team

reviews.title: The service is excellent.
reviews.text: Everything was perfect. First, when I got out of the taxi, I was called by my name. I think they were aware of the guests arriving today. Since it wasn't check-in time yet, when I mentioned I would go out, they said they would call or email me as soon as it was ready. I had seen that the amenities were Ferragamo, but they turned out to be Aesop. I like Aesop, so that was good. The pool was amazing; I watched the sunset while floating on a chair in the water. There was just one thing—the view from the window wasn't great. Right in front of me were construction workers sitting down and eating. In the morning, I used the sheer curtains.

reviews.title: Excellent in every way but…
reviews.text: The suite I had was amazing, very comfortable space. Flexible for relaxation or parties. My only gripe would be, the sound would enter from the hotel walk way. I could hear other guests talking and doors closing and opening while sitting in the living room. A simple sliding door to separate the foyer entrance would fix this. The units clearly have space for it. Sound management is excellent from the exterior of the building with double pane glass. So why not treat the inside as well. It’s a shame to be in such a nice room but with poor sound sealing from hallway activity.

reviews.title: Quite literally the best hotel we've ever been to!
reviews.text:
My wife wanted to pamper ourselves for our anniversary, so we decided to book a fancy hotel for the weekend. We've travelled a lot over the years, so we've had our share of good and not-so-good hotels, staff, and cleanliness. We can wholeheartedly say this this is literally the best hotel we've ever been to, in any kind of manner. The place is super fancy, well kept, the staff is the friendliest and most helpful we've ever met, the services and amenities in the hotel we're top class. We felt fully pampered during our stay and our vacation exceeded all expectations. We weren't concerned too much about the location because we came mostly for relaxation at the hotel, but the location itself is at the center of Bangkok and close to many things around you. We also made sure to thank the hotel staff for their lovely hospitality in person.
There is only one problem now - how can we ever stay at another hotel? we are not sure, because it would be very hard to meet the high bar that Waldorf Astoria Bangkok has set! We had a lovely time and we will definitely come back for more. Thank you so much!
reviews.response:
Dear Shlomi,

Thank you for choosing Waldorf Astoria Bangkok to celebrate your anniversary and for sharing such a heartfelt review. We are truly honored to be part of such a special occasion and delighted that you and your wife enjoyed the stay, our hospitality, and the amenities. Your kind words inspire us to continue providing exceptional experiences for our guests, and we will gladly share your compliments with them. We look forward to welcoming you back for another unforgettable stay.

Kind regards,
Stefan Bucher
Director of Operations

reviews.title: Thank you for making my trip to Bangkok so happy.
reviews.text:
I stayed in Bangkok for 2 nights on my first trip. I booked 2 rooms and received a free upgrade for one of them.  
1. Location: It was in the city center, making it easy to walk to shopping malls like Central World, Siam Paragon, and Big C Mart. Lumphini Park was a 10-minute walk away, so I enjoyed nice walks. It took about a 5-minute walk to the BTS station.  
2. Accommodation condition: I brought a shower filter from Korea and used it; the filter was only slightly dirty after 2 nights. The cleaning was thorough, and they cleaned well after I went out. There was no noise from construction in the room.  
3. Breakfast: It was excellent. The staff's service was very good, and everything was delicious. The egg dishes and smoothies were particularly tasty.  
4. Facilities: You can see construction from the swimming pool, but it wasn’t bothersome. We enjoyed watching the construction while swimming. The water depth is 110 cm, which is suitable for those who can swim. There are no restrictions on goggles or swim caps. The fitness area is small, but it has good Technogym equipment. You should bring your workout clothes and shoes.  
5. Service: I was very impressed. I lost my wallet while walking in Lumphini Park, but the hotel contacted the park and helped me retrieve it. Wow… I almost had a big problem, but thanks to the hotel’s response, I could happily finish my trip.
reviews.response:
Dear soyoung,

Thank you for staying with us recently and for taking the time to share your feedback. 
We are pleased to hear that your overall experience met your expectations and that you had a pleasant stay with us. 
It is great to learn that you found our location convenient for exploring the city, and appreciated the cleanliness and comfort of your room. 
We are also glad you enjoyed the breakfast at The Brasserie as well as our pool and gym. We appreciate your understanding regarding the construction view.
We are especially happy that we could assist in recovering your lost wallet, ensuring your trip ended on a positive note. 
We look forward to the opportunity to welcome you back to Bangkok in the future.

Kind regards,
Simeon Olle
General Manager

reviews.title: 실망
reviews.text:
아고다 이용을 매년 10회 이상은 하는거 같다 그럼 총 50회도 넘지만 후기를 거의 처음 써 보는거 같다. 

브랜드만 보고 예약했는데 실망이 크다. 
시원하거나 웅장한 로비는 없고, 시티뷰는 공사현장 이고,  방안의 웰컴 과일도 배 3개가 너무도 안 이쁘게 손님을 기다리고 있다. 방은 먼지와 꿉꿉한 곰팡이 냄새로 콧물과 기침이 자꾸나온다. 알러지 현상인거 같다.  방안에 나방과의 작은 벌래들이 자꾸 나오고  미니바도 샤워다운도 다 별로다 …  뭐하나 마음에 들어오는게 없이 2일을 꾹 참고 보냈다. 조식은 동선이 너무 멀어서 건물 한바퀴를 돌아야 하는데 뚜껑들이 무거워 힘들게 음식을 얻을 수 있다.  수영장도 믿믿하고 그나마 해 들어오는 선베드가 얼마없다. 뭔가 수질도 의심스럽다.  친절도 기대하지 말아야 한다. 
나는

커플도 가족도 나홀로 여행자도 비 추천한다. 절대 오지 마시길 … … . 
(상하이와 비교금지 / 완전 실망)

reviews.title: Worst experience ever
reviews.text:
I made a reservation with a one-day difference by mistake, and the hotel's response was very disappointing for a 5-star hotel. Agoda informed me that the hotel refused to change the date. Without offering any alternatives, they told me I would have to pay 100% of the accommodation fee again. They also mentioned that I couldn’t use the breakfast I already paid for a day earlier, even though I will be leaving Bangkok and unable to have the breakfast I already paid for (they did offer to give me a 300 baht discount on the breakfast).
Additionally, I reserved two rooms and paid a 6,000 baht deposit. However, they deducted charges like room service from the 3,000 baht deposit per room. When I asked about this, they didn’t provide a proper explanation. Due to my flight schedule, I couldn’t investigate further and had to leave, but if the refund doesn’t process smoothly, I plan to send a separate email to the hotel to complain. Overall, it was a very disappointing experience, and I won’t be using this hotel again.
reviews.response:
Dear cherryjuvile,

Thank you for choosing to stay with us. We regret any inconvenience experienced during your visit.
As per investigation, your booking was made for 3 nights and we honored that booking as made/requested. You chose to depart a day early, without adequate notice. 
As your booking was subject to the terms and conditions provided by Agoda, we were unable to alter the reservation, and the package did not include breakfast as per the booking detail. 


Kind regards,
Simeon Olle
General Manager

reviews.title: Besvikelse
reviews.text: En stor besvikelse eftersom jag förväntade mig ett bättre hotell. Fortfarande konstruktion brevid så det är väsen hela dagarna. Det var en konstig lukt i lobbyn och i hallen utanför rummen alla 4 dagarna. Känns inte som dem tar hand om hotellet, kändes lite sunkigt. Personalen var trevlig.  Men jag hade nog valt ett annat 5 stjärnigt nästa gång.
reviews.response:
Dear Lisa, 
Thank you for choosing to stay with us. We are sorry to hear about your disappointment and sincerely apologize for any inconveniences experienced during your visit.
We fully understand and appreciate your constructive comments with regarding the unpleasant smell in our public space mentioned and have already addressed the issue accordingly. 
Therefore, we are delighted to hear that our team have made your stay more positive.
Regarding the nearby construction, as we are located in the heart of the city, such developments are part of urban progress. We want to assure you that the main disruptive work has passed.
Once again, thank you for your feedback, and we hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back on your next visit where we can recover your confidence in us.

Kind regards,
Simeon Olle
General Manager

reviews.title: Exceptional Hospitality and Outstanding Service
reviews.text:
We stayed at the Waldorf Astoria Bangkok and the experience was absolutely wonderful. The service was outstanding and the level of hospitality truly exceptional.
A special mention goes to Ms. Emily, who checked us in. She was not only incredibly warm and welcoming, but also proactively offered us an early check-in after our overnight flight. This thoughtful gesture made a huge difference for us and was deeply appreciated.
The service throughout our stay was truly distinguished, and we will most definitely be returning.
reviews.response:
Dear Dominika,

Thank you for choosing Waldorf Astoria Bangkok and for sharing such a thoughtful review.

We are delighted to know that your stay was such a positive experience and that the level of hospitality and service throughout your visit left a lasting impression. It is always encouraging to learn that thoughtful care made a meaningful difference to our guests, particularly after a long journey.

We look forward to welcoming you back again in the future for another memorable stay.

Warm regards,
Waldorf Astoria Bangkok Team

reviews.title: 5 star hotel with great location!
reviews.text: The hotel staff are always helpful and friendly.  The location is great close to everything.  The hotel is well maintained and the breakfast is superb!
reviews.response:
Dear CHEN,

Thank you for staying with us and for sharing your experience. 
We are pleased to hear that our hotel met your expectations, especially with the hospitality provided by our team, our convenient location, and the breakfast at The Brasserie. 
Ensuring the comfort and enjoyment of our guests is our top priority, and your feedback serves as a great source of motivation for our dedicated team.
We look forward to welcoming you back to Bangkok in the future.

Kind regards,
Simeon Olle
General Manager
